title: Bitcoin retail sentiment still matters, says Swan Bitcoin CEO
summary: Swan Bitcoin CEO Cory Klippsten said it is important to pay attention to retail sentiment around Bitcoin, as ownership is still far from concentrated and “it’s not like Blackrock owns the Bitcoin.”

title: Bitcoin dip buyers place $500M in bids as $70K retest looms
summary: Over $500 million in Bitcoin bids now sit near $70,000, while options traders and futures positions converge around the same level.
